channel.title: Matt Childs — Writing
channel.description: Writing by Matt Childs on software, leadership, and technology

item.title: My Thoughts on Estimation and Hitting Delivery Dates in Software
item.description: Why software estimation is harder than construction, and when trust grows in its place.

item.title: Enriching Your Career Through Your Personal Interests
item.description: What reading about urban planning taught me about working in technology.
